title: attribution ŌĆö trait composition
description: Three owned traits. `BelongsToAttribution` is the FK trait for downstream models that hold an attribution FK (rarely used ŌĆö most downstream modules copy the FROZEN snapshot into a jsonb column rather than an FK). `HasAttribution` is a marker trait for models that carry an `attribution jsonb NULL` column (frozen snapshot). `HasAttributionSnapshot` is a scope + accessor helper for models composing `HasAttribution`. Order matters when composed with `BelongsToTenant` ŌĆö tenant MUST come first so the scope chain observes the tenant context.

owned.description: Mixed into any domain model that carries a `attribution_id` FK. Adds the `attribution()` belongsTo relation + a `resolveInAttribution(?Attribution)` query scope. RARELY used ŌĆö most downstream modules prefer HasAttribution (frozen snapshot in jsonb) over BelongsToAttribution (live FK) because attribution can be reset. The FK form is only used by AttributionTouchpoint (the internal ledger).
usedBy: attribution::AttributionTouchpoint (the internal ledger; touchpoints hold a live FK because they're the write-side of last-touch tracking)
composition_notes: Order: `BelongsToTenant` must appear BEFORE `BelongsToAttribution` in the trait list so the tenant scope resolves first.
The trait does NOT auto-fill attribution_id on create ŌĆö callers must set it explicitly (touchpoints are the only consumer today and they know their attribution_id).
Refuses to save a row whose `attribution_id` points at an Attribution in a different tenant (defense-in-depth).

owned.description: Composed onto any downstream model that carries a frozen `attribution jsonb NULL` column (marketing events, analytics events, subscriptions, invoices, referral conversions). Adds no query scopes ŌĆö just a getter that unpacks the jsonb into a structured DTO for readability. The trait's presence is a marker for the tenancy-compliance-auditor to recognise the row as attribution-carrying.

Extends HasAttribution with additional query helpers for reading the jsonb via SQL ŌĆö `->whereAttributionSource(?string)`, `->whereAttributionCampaign(?string)`, `->whereAttributionMedium(?string)`, `->whereFirstTouchSource(?string)`. These generate `WHERE attribution->>'source' = ?` etc for direct rollup queries. Optional (only composed by models with reporting workloads).

framework.reason: Attribution only. NOT AttributionTouchpoint ŌĆö touchpoints are append-only (no soft-delete).

foundation.reason: Attribution only ŌĆö searchable by campaign/source. NOT AttributionTouchpoint (too high-volume for full-text).

tenants.reason: Every owned row carries tenant_id per tenancy-columns.md ┬¦3.

audit.reason: Attribution lifecycle transitions + reset requests are compliance-relevant (7-year retention).

activity.reason: Attribution profile lifecycle transitions feed the staff-visible activity feed. NOT on AttributionTouchpoint ŌĆö too high-volume.

attribution.notes: Order matters: BelongsToTenant precedes every scope-observing trait. Auditable applies because lifecycle transitions + reset requests have 7-year audit retention. NO BelongsToApplication / BelongsToRegion / BelongsToOrganization / BelongsToBranch ŌĆö attribution cascades through tenant only (tenancy-columns.md ┬¦5). NO BelongsToUser ŌĆö subject is polymorphic (morphTo). NO BelongsToAttribution ŌĆö attribution IS the attribution.

attribution_touchpoint.notes: NO SoftDeletes ŌĆö touchpoints are append-only ledger rows. NO Searchable ŌĆö too high-volume for full-text index. NO Auditable ŌĆö the parent attribution's audit trail suffices; per-touchpoint audit would explode volume. NO HasActivityLog for the same reason. HasMetadata provides a jsonb field for admin retroactive re-tagging (the only field the observer permits updating post-create).

downstream_composition_example.description: Wave 5 marketing::MarketingEvent example ŌĆö shows how downstream events compose HasAttribution + HasAttributionSnapshot for frozen-snapshot analysis.
downstream_composition_example.notes: Marketing events carry a frozen `attribution jsonb NULL` column populated at create-time from AttributionSnapshotBuilder.build(). Reading attribution via `$marketingEvent->attribution` returns a structured DTO (via HasAttribution). Querying by attribution via `MarketingEvent::whereAttributionCampaign('spring-signup-2026')` uses jsonb operators (via HasAttributionSnapshot).
